name: empire
description: Claude Code skills for the solo founder commanding a one-person empire.

plugins.name: empire-git
plugins.description: Git workflow skills: worktree lifecycle (open, close, merge, list, cleanup, help) and PR description templating.

plugins.name: empire-dev
plugins.description: Development collaboration: parallel specialist code review (team-review) plus pre-implementation diagnostics (probe, distill, shape, weigh, slice) and 11 bundled dev subagents.

plugins.name: empire-research
plugins.description: Research collaboration: open-ended exploration (explore), closed comparison (compare), hallucination checking (verify), and claim investigation (dissect) plus a bundled research subagent.

plugins.name: empire-product
plugins.description: Product intelligence: pitches (pitch), idea pressure-testing (vet), competitor mapping (recon), deck generation (deck), and naming (mint) plus three bundled subagents.

plugins.name: empire-rules
plugins.description: Utility: sync per-plugin routing snippets into the project's AGENTS.md. Auto-installed as a dependency of other empire-* plugins.
